items.title: Investigating Autonomous Agent Contributions in the Wild
items.summary: A new study analyzes the activity patterns and code changes made by autonomous AI agents in real-world scenarios, offering insights into their practical contributions.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making Audio AI More Natural and Reliable
items.summary: Google announces Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, an update focused on enhancing the naturalness and reliability of audio AI interactions.

items.title: Copilot is 'for entertainment purposes only,' according to Microsoft’s terms of use
items.summary: Microsoft's terms of service for Copilot state that the AI assistant is 'for entertainment purposes only,' raising questions about liability and intended use.

items.title: Gated Condition Injection without Multimodal Attention: Towards Controllable Linear-Attention Transformers
items.summary: Researchers propose a novel method for controllable linear-attention transformers that allows for gated condition injection without relying on multimodal attention mechanisms.

items.title: In Japan, the robot isn't coming for your job; it's filling the one nobody wants
items.summary: Japan is demonstrating how experimental physical AI can successfully fill undesirable jobs, showcasing a practical application of robotics in the real world.

items.title: Tex3D: Objects as Attack Surfaces via Adversarial 3D Textures for Vision-Language-Action Models
items.summary: A new paper reveals how adversarial 3D textures can turn physical objects into attack surfaces for vision-language-action models, posing significant security risks.

items.title: GPA: Learning GUI Process Automation from Demonstrations
items.summary: A new research paper introduces GPA, a system that learns to automate GUI processes by observing user demonstrations, streamlining repetitive tasks.

items.title: Omni123: Exploring 3D Native Foundation Models with Limited 3D Data by Unifying Text to 2D and 3D Generation
items.summary: Omni123 presents a novel approach to developing 3D native foundation models, leveraging limited 3D data by unifying text-to-2D and text-to-3D generation techniques.

items.title: DynaVid: Learning to Generate Highly Dynamic Videos using Synthetic Motion Data
items.summary: DynaVid introduces a new method for generating highly dynamic videos by effectively utilizing synthetic motion data to train video generation models.

items.title: Powering Product Discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: OpenAI details how ChatGPT is being enhanced to improve product discovery, suggesting new features for users to find and interact with products.

items.title: How I Found $1,240/Month in Wasted LLM API Costs (And Built a Tool to Find Yours)
items.summary: A developer shares insights on identifying and reducing significant wasted LLM API costs, along with a tool to help others optimize their expenditures.

items.title: Building a Continuous Voice Interface with the OpenAI Realtime API
items.summary: A guide demonstrates how to construct a continuous voice interface using OpenAI's Realtime API, enabling more fluid and responsive conversational AI applications.

items.title: AutoMIA: Improved Baselines for Membership Inference Attack via Agentic Self-Exploration
items.summary: AutoMIA proposes enhanced baselines for membership inference attacks by employing agentic self-exploration, improving the ability to detect if specific data was used in model training.

items.title: T5Gemma-TTS Technical Report
items.summary: A technical report details T5Gemma-TTS, a new text-to-speech model, outlining its architecture, training, and performance characteristics.

items.title: Embarrassingly Simple Self-Distillation Improves Code Generation
items.summary: New research demonstrates that an 'embarrassingly simple' self-distillation technique can significantly enhance the performance of code generation models.
